title: Refactor login endpoint to use AuthService
description: Refactor `/api/auth/login` (src/api/auth/login.ts) to delegate to `AuthService.login()` instead of using `UserStore` + `SessionStore`. The `AuthService` already operates on Payload users with PBKDF2 (25000 iterations) password verification, token generation, and refresh token storage. Update `login.test.ts` to use the AuthService-based test pattern already established in logout.test.ts and refresh.test.ts: mock Payload, instantiate AuthService, and call login(). Note: register.ts already correctly uses AuthService and register.test.ts already uses the AuthService test pattern — no changes needed for those files.
existing_patterns: src/api/auth/register.ts line 69: delegates to authService.login() — establishes the pattern of login.ts delegating to AuthService
src/api/auth/logout.test.ts lines 14-26: AuthService test pattern — mock Payload, create JwtService + AuthService, clear mocks in beforeEach — this exact pattern should be applied to login.test.ts
src/api/auth/refresh.test.ts lines 14-26: same AuthService test pattern as logout.test.ts
src/auth/auth-service.ts verifyPassword() line 45-60: PBKDF2 25000-iteration password verification already implemented, no new code needed
src/api/auth/register.test.ts lines 1-37: already uses AuthService test pattern, confirming register tests are already unified
